introSection: Dragon Mini Train is a roller coaster at Al Qasba in Sharjah, UAE. It opened on 2017.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders.

sections.title: Ride experience
sections.content: The coaster is a Figure 8, made by Happy Fun Rides of UAE.

sections.title: Layout
sections.content: The ride is a figure 8 coaster; using booster wheels, the ride goes upwards right, goes forward then drops slightly to the left. The ride has multiple laps.

fullText:
Dragon Mini Train is a roller coaster at Al Qasba in Sharjah, UAE. It opened on 2017.

Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders.

The coaster is a Figure 8, made by Happy Fun Rides of UAE.

The ride is a figure 8 coaster; using booster wheels, the ride goes upwards right, goes forward then drops slightly to the left. The ride has multiple laps.
